overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night in a dystopian urban plaza. The camera moves through wet streets with burning wreckage, approaches a group of cybernetically-enhanced characters conducting a photo shoot in a building alcove, then circles back to the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban plaza with burning vehicle wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward a building entrance with metal shutters

entered.detail: large concrete overpass spanning the plaza with green neon lighting underneath
multiple wrecked cars burning with orange flames and rising smoke
illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall brutalist concrete structure with multiple levels
derelict white van parked near the building edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rain-soaked urban plaza at night, dominated by an overpass overhead and burning vehicles in the distance. Neon green and orange lights reflect off the wet asphalt as the camera moves forward toward a concrete building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered building entrance with metal roll-up shutters

events.description: moves from open rain-exposed plaza into sheltered building alcove

agents.ego_description: approaching two characters standing near a metal roll-up door in the alcove

notable_agents.action: character with pink hair and green suit standing with arms raised holding camera device
character with green mohawk and crossed arms standing against the wall observing

entered.detail: large corrugated metal shutter door with graffiti markings
overhead concrete structure providing shelter from rain
black plastic bins and covered objects against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a sheltered concrete alcove, leaving the rain behind. Two characters with cybernetic face implants and neon accents stand near a metal roll-up door—one appears to be a photographer with pink hair, the other an observer with a green mohawk.

scene_state.functional_zone: photo shoot setup in building alcove with furniture debris

events.description: third character emerges from behind door and begins dancing for photo shoot
photographer raises camera device and begins taking photos of dancer

agents.ego_description: circling around the dancer to capture different angles of the photo shoot interaction

notable_agents.action: dancer with green hair, full body tattoos, and glowing red eye implants performing energetic dance moves
photographer with pink hair actively taking photos with handheld camera device

entered.detail: abandoned red sofa covered with tarp against the wall
scattered cardboard sheets and trash on the wet ground

segments.scene_description: A third character emerges and begins dancing while the pink-haired photographer captures the performance. The camera circles the dancer, showing off extensive tattoos and cybernetic implants, with the red couch and debris visible in the background of the alcove.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with burning vehicle wreckage and smoke

events.description: exits covered alcove and returns to open rain-exposed plaza
camera turns to focus on the burning vehicles in the plaza center

agents.ego_description: moving away from the group and exploring the plaza, focusing on the burning wreckage

entered.detail: wrecked cars with open doors burning intensely, producing thick smoke
rising smoke and steam mixing with the rain

segments.scene_description: The camera retreats from the photo shoot, exiting the sheltered alcove back into the rain. It turns toward the burning vehicle cluster in the plaza center, highlighting the wreckage and rising smoke against the neon-lit overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched urban plaza into a sheltered alcove before returning to the chaotic city center. It begins by gliding across wet asphalt reflecting neon green and orange lights, moving beneath a massive overpass toward a concrete building entrance. As the camera enters the sheltered alcove, the rain vanishes, revealing a group of cybernetically-enhanced characters including a pink-haired photographer and an observer with a green mohawk. The scene then circles a dancing figure with extensive tattoos and implants, capturing the performance against a backdrop of a red couch and debris. Finally, the camera retreats from the alcove back into the downpour, turning toward the center of the plaza to highlight burning vehicle wreckage and rising smoke under the neon glow.
